meta.slogan: 教AI用台灣的眼睛看世界

concepts.name: Taiwanese Beef Noodles
concepts.cultural_prompt: A bowl of authentic Taiwanese beef noodles, rich dark broth, topped with green pickled mustard greens (suancai) and braised beef chunks, ceramic bowl, chopsticks

concepts.name: Braised Pork Rice (Lu Rou Fan)
concepts.cultural_prompt: A bowl of Braised Pork Rice (Lu Rou Fan), minced pork sauce, yellow pickled radish slice, steamed rice, taiwanese street food style

concepts.name: Bubble Tea
concepts.cultural_prompt: Hand-shaken bubble milk tea with black tapioca pearls, plastic cup with a sealing film lid, wide straw, holding in hand, taiwan street background

concepts.name: Scooter Waterfall
concepts.cultural_prompt: The 'Scooter Waterfall' of Taiwan, hundreds of motorcyclists waiting at a traffic light, wearing helmets, busy rush hour at Taipei Bridge, urban chaos

concepts.name: Ornate Temple
concepts.cultural_prompt: Traditional Taiwanese temple, ornate swallow-tail roof ridge with colorful dragon sculptures (jiǎnniàn), red pillars, hanging red lanterns, incense smoke

concepts.name: Old Apartment with Iron Grilles
concepts.cultural_prompt: Old Taiwanese apartment facade, retro patterned iron window grilles (window cages), potted plants on balcony, mosaic tiles, hanging laundry

concepts.name: Ghost Festival (Pudu)
concepts.cultural_prompt: Ghost Festival (Zhongyuan Pudu) in Taiwan, long tables on the street filled with food offerings, incense sticks, burning joss paper, religious flags

concepts.name: Mazu Pilgrimage
concepts.cultural_prompt: Mazu Pilgrimage procession, palanquin, firecrackers exploding, crowded street, devotees kneeling, traditional religious performance
